About This Dashboard
What It Does
Short-term momentum ranker scoring 700+ tickers on returns (1d to 1y), SMA gate (above 30/50/100/200 day), ratio consistency across timeframes, and resilience on bad SPY days. Higher composite scores indicate stronger, more consistent short-term momentum.
Today's Reading
# Market Analysis: Momentum Ranker Output PARR dominates today's ranking at #1 with a composite score of 95.9, driven by exceptional long-term momentum (353.93% 1-year return) and near-perfect consistency across timeframes, though its ratio_6m_3m of 0.98 suggests recent deceleration after a massive 82.75% three-month surge. The stock passes all SMA gates and outperforms SPY by 338.82% over the year while showing a clean momentum signal with strong resilience on down market days (99.3 spy-day score). CLMT ranks second with solid fundamentals—167.93% 1-year return, all SMA gates cleared, and notably low correlation to fixed income (avoiding the debt-driven correlation exposure that anchors PARR)—but trails PARR on absolute score due to more moderate near-term acceleration (28.64% monthly return vs. PARR's 40.47%). Both tickers show healthy ratio consistency (4 passes each) and trade well above their moving averages, signaling sustained uptrends rather than isolated spikes. The data suggests a market favoring stocks with extended momentum runs that maintain correlation discipline, with PARR's energy-sector tilt (0.45 correlation to XLE) presenting a more concentrated risk profile than
